title: Scenario D - Repeated Miswire with Teacher Handoff
subtitle: Escalation after multiple unsuccessful attempts and declining student confidence.
lab_task: Place the voltmeter correctly while preserving a meaningful current path.
learning_objective: Explain why a voltmeter should be connected across a target component rather than inserted into the main loop.
presentation_summary: The repeated measurement miswire indicates that the learner now needs live teacher mediation rather than another round of autonomous prompting.
teacher_note: This scenario is ideal for demonstrating the handoff boundary between automated scaffolding and instructor-led intervention.
